mechanic.name: Pyro Blight
mechanic.desc:
The boss gains a Fire Ring, increasing their DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color> and continuously dealing DMG to your squad within the ring.
Triggering 3 Elemental Marks on the boss within 5s grants the squad Enhancement, increasing Auto Attack DMG by <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color> for 10s, and disables the boss's Fire Ring for 10s.

mechanic.name: Fervent Combat
mechanic.desc:
The boss gains 1 stack of Battle Frenzy every 5 seconds, increasing the DMG it deals by <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color> (up to 5 stacks).
When the Main Trekker triggers a Mark, removes 1 stack of Battle Frenzy from the boss. Successfully removing a stack of Battle Frenzy restores 20 Energy for the squad, and increases the boss's Ultimate DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color>, lasting for 10s and resets when triggered again.

mechanic.name: Devouring Dark Ring
mechanic.desc:
When the boss possesses Dark Ring, its DMG increases by <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color>, and it deals an additional AoE DMG every 5s.
Dealing 20 hits to the boss within 3s disables the boss's Dark Ring for 15s. The boss also takes <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color> more Skill DMG dealt by Support Trekkers during this period.

mechanic.name: Reality Shift
mechanic.desc:
The boss shifts between Illusion Form and Reality Form every <color=#ec6d21>15s</color>.
In Reality Form, the boss takes <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color> more Minion DMG. Triggering a mark increases the current form's duration by <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color>s. It can only be triggered once per sec.
In Illusion Form, the boss takes <color=#ec6d21>&Param3&</color> increased Skill DMG. Dealing Minion DMG each time increases the current form's duration by <color=#ec6d21>&Param4&</color>s. It can only be triggered once per sec.

mechanic.name: Call Down the Thunder
mechanic.desc:
When the boss has Thunderbolt, its DMG is increased by <color=#ec6d21>&Param4&</color> and deals additional DMG in a small area 4 times every 3s.
Dealing Support Skill DMG <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color> times to the boss within <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color>s disables Thunderbolt for 15s, and increases the Skill DMG the boss takes from Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>&Param3&</color> for the duration.

mechanic.name: Momentum
mechanic.desc: The boss gains a <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color> DMG Boost. For each player Minion on the field, the boss deals <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color> less DMG and is afflicted with <color=#ec6d21>&Param3&</color> VUL. This effect stacks up to 3 times and persists for <color=#ec6d21>&Param4&</color>s after the Minion disappears.

mechanic.name: Focus
mechanic.desc:
The boss gains a stack of Focus after taking DMG for <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color> times, boosting its DMG Dealt by <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color>.
Triggering a Mark <color=#ec6d21>&Param4&</color> times within <color=#ec6d21>&Param3&</color>s clears all Focus stacks. For the next <color=#ec6d21>&Param5&</color>s, the boss takes <color=#ec6d21>&Param6&</color> more DMG from Support Skills. This effect triggers up to once every <color=#ec6d21>&Param7&</color>s. Retriggering resets the duration.

mechanic.name: Baron Stance
mechanic.desc:
The boss alternates between Warrior and Honeypot forms, switching every <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color>s and clearing all its debuffs (Resilience Break does not count toward the timer).
In Warrior form, Count of the Duloos takes <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color> reduced Ultimate DMG and <color=#ec6d21>&Param3&</color> increased Auto Attack DMG.
In Honeypot form, Count of the Duloos takes <color=#ec6d21>&Param4&</color> reduced Mark DMG and <color=#ec6d21>&Param5&</color> increased Skill DMG.

mechanic.name: Aqua Ring
mechanic.desc:
While the boss possesses Water Ring, its DMG is increased by <color=#ec6d21>&Param1&</color>, and it deals AoE DMG every 5s.
Dealing <color=#ec6d21>&Param2&</color> instances of DMG to the boss within 5s disables Water Ring for <color=#ec6d21>&Param3&</color>s. When Water Ring is disabled:
Dealing <color=#ec6d21>&Param4&</color> instances of Support DMG to the boss within 5s increases the Auto Attack DMG the boss takes by<color=#ec6d21>&Param5&</color>.
Dealing <color=#ec6d21>&Param6&</color> instances of Main Trekker DMG within 5s increases the Skill DMG the boss takes from Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>&Param7&</color>.
